content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.08%, VIX +3.2% to 17.15 — risk-off bias with banking weakness. However, IT (+0.92%) and pockets of pharma/chemicals/auto-components/capital goods showing strong relative strength on Q4 results. Book is +1.29% today on Q4-driven moves in COFORGE (+16.6%), PNBHOUSING (+4.7%), MARICO (+2.6%), PIDILITIND (+8.7%), BHARATFORG (+7.4%), BAJAJ-AUTO (+6.6%). Priority is locking in COFORGE and PNBHOUSING gains via trail SLs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1062.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.2% unrealized at CMP 1090.60. Current SL 1072.12 is only ~1.7% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap rule borderline. Holding at 1062 (~2.6% below CMP) gives noise tolerance while locking gain of ~7.9% from entry 984. Q4 fundamentals strong (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, AUM cross 90k Cr). Target 1135 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1335.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.3% unrealized at CMP 1362.60. Current SL 1338.68 already locks ~6.3% gain. Keep SL essentially flat at 1335 (1.0%+ trail-gap below CMP per Rule 14c). Q4 30% revenue growth, Encora deal — but PAT has one-time tax benefit caveat. Target 1420 unchanged; will reassess as price approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -0.7%. SL 121 intact, gold ETF as VIX rises is appropriate hedge. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% unrealized. SL 818 already at near-breakeven. Q4 PAT +14% — leave room to run toward 845 target. Stock at record highs with FMCG bid; no MODIFY needed (would be no-op micro-adjust)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% unrealized at CMP 3067 vs SL 3030 (1.2% gap, within trail-gap rule borderline). Q4 PAT +24%, defense order book intact. Letting position breathe; SL already locks small gain. Target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.2% unrealized. SL 825 already locks +2.4%. EBITDA margin all-time-high 46.5%, MF AUM 55.1L Cr. Trail SL is appropriately placed; not adjusting (would be ~1.7% from CMP 839.75 — fine as is)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280bps. Position only -0.4%, SL 1445 (-2.6% from CMP). Day's intraday wobble well within budget. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%. Q4 turnaround (loss to PAT 166 Cr), Zaynich pipeline. SL 1580 (-1.8% from CMP) — within budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% unrealized. SL 2745 (-1.3% from CMP). Specialty chemicals momentum intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2% unrealized. Q4 record revenue, dividend Rs 47/share. SL 9020 (-1.1% from CMP). Hold to target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%. Q4 PAT -17% YoY (one-time exceptionals). Defense order book Rs 10,961 Cr. NA truck headwind a concern but priced. SL 1955 (-2.5% from CMP) — within budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM 5.91 trillion. Banking weakness today but ABCAP non-rate-sensitive. SL 354 (-2.5% from CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6%. Q4 PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 (~12% premium). SL 10440 (-2.5% from CMP). Hold to target 11260; buyback record date is upcoming catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1062.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1072.12 — wait, actually existing SL 1072.12 is TIGHTER than 1062. Reverting: keep existing SL 1072.12 (HOLD). Cannot loosen SL per Rule 14."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1338.68 already locks ~6.3% gain. CMP 1362.60 gives ~1.8% trail-gap, acceptable. Not loosening."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL 121 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at near-breakeven, target 845 achievable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 locks small gain, defense thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks +2.4%, thesis strong post-Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pharma momentum, SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Chemicals leader; SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Cables leader Q4 beat; SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense vertical strong; SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30%; SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback catalyst pending, SL within budget."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walked through fresh BULLISH candidates against Rule 18: LAURUSLABS (+0.10 mod, ATH extended) — REJECT, valuation extended at 52w high after multi-day rally; entering at top of range against Rule 11 spirit (Pharma broadly extended). GABRIEL (-0.03 mod) — REJECT, Q4 board May 13 = binary event within 3 sessions per Rule 11. THERMAX, FINCABLES, NUVAMA, INDUSINDBK — REJECT (INDUSINDBK governance overhang per Rule 13 still live; THERMAX/FINCABLES/NUVAMA not in deep-data set this tick). DABUR, RAMCOCEM, LUPIN, APOLLOTYRE, PERSISTENT, TATATECH — REJECT, no compelling differentiation vs current 13-name book; book already covers Pharma (WOCKPHARMA), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG, GABRIEL theme), Chemicals (SRF, PIDILITIND), FinServ (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), Capital Goods (GRSE, POLYCAB), FMCG (MARICO), IT (COFORGE), Hedge (GOLDBEES). Deployment 61% with cash 39%; soft target 80% has ~19% room (~Rs 188K). Cluster discipline (Rule 10): Auto cluster already has BAJAJ-AUTO + BHARATFORG = 2 names; adding GABRIEL would be 3rd in same cluster on same theme day = REJECT per cluster cap. FinServ cluster has 3 names already. Capital goods 2 names. Today is risk-off (VIX +3.2%, Bank Nifty -1.08%) — Rule 9 macro caution justifies sitting on the 39% cash buffer rather than adding into a -0.63% Nifty session with VIX rising.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong portfolio day +1.29% on Q4-driven moves. Book is well-diversified across 13 names, no single position exceeds ~9% (POLYCAB Rs 45,500), sector caps respected. Cumulative experiment P&L now positive (+0.98%) for first time after the Day-12 drawdown. Today's discipline: let winners run with appropriate trailing protection (PNBHOUSING SL 1072 locks +9%, COFORGE SL 1338 locks +6.3%), don't front-run SLs on small drawdowns (Rule 17). HFCL OPEN order from earlier session (3383m ago) appears stale — should be reviewed but no separate decision slot triggered as it's MIS LIMIT and likely already expired or will at session end."
}
